description: Simons Cat (CAT) emerged in 2024 on BNB Smart Chain as a mischievous feline memecoin inspired by the beloved animated character. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 CAT gives original CAT holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Simons Cat
